message:
fix(command): return Redis-compatible error for non-positive numkeys and expand conformance fixtures

Replace SyntaxError returns with proper "ERR numkeys can't be non-positive value" error strings
in SINTERCARD, LMPOP, ZMPOP, ZINTERCARD, BLMPOP, and BZMPOP to match upstream Redis behavior.
Add ~160 new conformance cases across geo, set, zset, list, server, and hyperloglog fixture suites
(940+ total). Update FEATURE_PARITY.md to reflect ACL CAT/GENPASS/LOG completion and new suite count.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
